brand.name: Green Empire Builders
brand.tagline: Long Island's Premier Home Builder & General Contractor
brand.footerTagline: Long Island's trusted general contractor & home builder. Licensed, insured, and locally based in Nassau & Suffolk Counties.
brand.heroSubtext: Your home is your biggest investment — we treat it that way. Green Empire Builders delivers custom home additions, renovations, kitchens, bathrooms, and new construction across Long Island with craftsmanship that lasts.
brand.servicesSubtext: From kitchen remodels and home additions to full custom builds — professional construction for Long Island homeowners.

services.name: Home Additions
services.description: Expand your living space with a professionally designed and built home addition — first-floor extensions, second-story additions, and room expansions built to match your existing structure.
services.heroText: Need more space but love your neighborhood? Green Empire Builders designs and constructs seamless home additions for Long Island homeowners — built to code, on budget, and finished to the highest standard.
bullets: Second-story additions and full floor expansions
Full architectural planning and permit coordination

services.name: Kitchen Remodeling
services.description: Transform your kitchen into the heart of your home — custom cabinetry, premium countertops, updated layouts, and modern finishes designed around how you actually cook and live.
services.heroText: A kitchen remodel is one of the best investments a Long Island homeowner can make. Green Empire Builders handles every detail — from demolition to the final cabinet hardware — so your new kitchen is exactly what you envisioned.

services.name: Bathroom Remodeling
services.description: Upgrade your bathroom from dated to stunning — custom tile work, walk-in showers, new vanities, and complete layout redesigns handled by an experienced Long Island crew.
services.heroText: Whether it's a master bath overhaul or a guest bathroom refresh, Green Empire Builders brings the same attention to detail to every project. We handle permits, plumbing coordination, tile work, and every finish in between.

services.name: Dormer Construction
services.description: Add square footage, natural light, and headroom to your attic with a professionally built dormer — one of the most cost-effective ways to expand your Long Island home.
services.heroText: Dormers add space, light, and value without the footprint of a full addition. Green Empire Builders has built dozens of dormers across Long Island — from shed dormers that open up an entire floor to custom designs that match your home's character.
bullets: Shed dormer and gable dormer construction

services.name: Basement Finishing
services.description: Turn your unfinished basement into livable square footage — home offices, playrooms, entertainment spaces, or guest suites built with proper waterproofing, egress, and code compliance.
services.heroText: An unfinished basement is wasted potential. Green Empire Builders transforms Long Island basements into fully finished, code-compliant living spaces — from framing and waterproofing through flooring, lighting, and final finishes.

services.name: Full Home Renovation
services.description: Complete home transformations — gut renovations, multi-room remodels, and whole-house updates managed by a single trusted contractor from first demo to final walkthrough.
services.heroText: Some homes need more than one room updated — they need a complete transformation. Green Empire Builders manages full-scale Long Island home renovations from start to finish, keeping your project on schedule and your home protected throughout.
bullets: Structural modifications and open floor plans
Full interior finishing — flooring, paint, trim
Single point of contact from demo to completion

services.name: Custom Home Building
services.description: Build the home you've always wanted, exactly the way you want it — custom design, premium materials, and hands-on project management from foundation to final key.
services.heroText: Building a custom home on Long Island is one of the most significant decisions you'll make. Green Empire Builders guides you through every phase — site prep, design, permits, construction, and finishing — with full transparency and no surprises.

reviews.name: James R.
reviews.text: Green Empire Builders added a full second story to our home and the result exceeded every expectation. The crew was professional, the project stayed on schedule, and the craftsmanship is outstanding. Best contractor we've ever worked with.

reviews.name: Patricia M.
reviews.text: We hired Green Empire for a complete kitchen and bathroom remodel. The attention to detail was incredible — they respected our home, communicated every step of the way, and the finished product looks like something out of a magazine.

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: From the initial consultation to the final walkthrough, Green Empire Builders was exceptional. They converted our unfinished basement into a beautiful living space on time and on budget. I've already referred them to three neighbors.

faqs.q: What areas of Long Island do you serve?
faqs.a: Green Empire Builders serves Nassau and Suffolk Counties including Massapequa, Merrick, Bellmore, Wantagh, Seaford, Freeport, Baldwin, Oceanside, Rockville Centre, Levittown, Amityville, Lindenhurst, Babylon, and more. Not sure if we cover your area? Call or text us at (516) 595-0684.

faqs.q: How do I know what my renovation will cost?
faqs.a: Every project is different, which is why we start with a free on-site consultation. We assess the scope, your goals, and your property before providing a detailed written quote. Factors that affect cost include square footage, material selections, structural changes, and permit requirements. We never start work without your full pricing approval.

faqs.q: Should I remodel or move to a bigger home?
faqs.a: In most cases, a well-planned renovation or addition is more cost-effective than buying a larger home on Long Island. You keep your location, your neighborhood, and your equity while gaining the space and features you want. We can help you evaluate whether an addition, a second story, or a full renovation makes the most sense for your situation.

Yes. Permit coordination is included in every project. We manage the full permitting process with your local building department so you do not have to. Work begins only after all required approvals are in place.

faqs.q: Can I add a second story to my existing home?
faqs.a: Yes. Second-story additions are one of our specialties. We assess your existing foundation and structure, coordinate engineering if needed, and build the addition to match the character of your home. Most Long Island homes are good candidates. We will give you an honest assessment at the consultation.

Yes. Green Empire Builders is fully licensed and insured in New York State. We carry comprehensive general liability insurance and workers compensation on every project, and we coordinate all permits through your local municipality.

faqs.q: How long does a typical remodeling project take?
faqs.a: Timelines depend on scope. A bathroom remodel typically takes 2 to 4 weeks. A kitchen renovation runs 4 to 8 weeks. A home addition or second story can take 3 to 6 months. We provide a realistic timeline before work begins and keep you updated throughout.

faqs.q: Do I need to move out during construction?
faqs.a: In most cases, no. For kitchen and bathroom remodels or room additions, most homeowners stay in the home during construction. For full gut renovations or major structural work, temporary relocation may be needed for a portion of the project. We will be upfront about this during the consultation so you can plan accordingly.

faqs.q: How much contingency budget should I set aside?
faqs.a: A standard recommendation is 10 to 15 percent of your total project budget. Renovation projects can uncover unexpected conditions once work begins, particularly in older Long Island homes. We do our best to identify potential issues during planning, but having a contingency in place means no surprises derail your project.
